# model.transition_matrix { #tspaint.model.transition_matrix }

```python
tspaint.model.transition_matrix(Q, t)
```

Branch transition probabilities ``P(t) = expm(Q t)`` (CLAUDE.md §2.1).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**Q**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array_like](`array_like`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(K, K)`` CTMC generator.

<code>[**t**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Branch length (time elapsed along the branch).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(K, K)`` transition-probability matrix over a branch of length ``t``.
